title: Meet The DARPA Scientist Abducted By an Alien
summary: Lieutenant Colonel John Blitch, a former Delta Force operator and DARPA scientist, discusses his personal alien abduction experiences, including a missing time incident during a mountain bike ride and a terrifying encounter with a mantis-like entity. He also shares his support for UFO whistleblower Jake Barber and discusses the science behind hypnotic regression and experiencer phenomena.

acronyms.definition: A research and development agency of the United States Department of Defense responsible for the development of emerging technologies for use by the military
Air Force special operations unit that provides combat control capabilities
A committee that reviews and monitors research involving human subjects to ensure ethical standards are maintained
A test that measures electrical activity in the brain

organizations_mentioned: FREE (Foundation for Research into Extraterrestrial and Extraordinary Encounters)

events.description: John Blitch experienced a missing time incident during a mountain bike ride near Denver, Colorado, shortly after the Oklahoma City bombing
John Blitch was born in Idaho Falls
John Blitch's first wife passed away
Betty and Barney Hill abduction case in New Hampshire

key_claims.claim: Jake Barber went through the combat control pipeline and was diverted to an anonymized program retrieving non-human craft including an egg-shaped craft and an octagonal craft
John Blitch experienced at least 5 hours of missing time during a mountain bike ride in 1995
John Blitch's wife filed a missing person's report and searched for him for hours during his missing time incident
John Blitch had an encounter with a mantis-like entity that communicated telepathically and demonstrated it could harm his body but not his soul
Sleep paralysis does not explain abduction phenomena because it only lasts seconds to minutes, not hours
Hypnotic regression evidence is admissible in court in many US counties and has contributed to death row convictions in Texas
We are an up-and-coming species in a galactic society teeming with life
Humans may be a genetic experiment based on experiencer literature and personal experiences
The Fermi Paradox is based on a flawed assumption that aliens would want to reveal themselves
Terry Lovelace's cell phone health data shows he climbed six stories in less than a minute in a one-story house with no stairs
